mapper.select:
SELECT c.comm_no, c.comm_sugg_no, c.comm_parent, c.comm_content, c.comm_cdate, c.comm_mdate, c.comm_usage, c.comm_writer, c.comm_level, e.emp_name AS empName
FROM sugg_comment c
LEFT JOIN emp e ON c.comm_writer = e.emp_id
WHERE c.comm_sugg_no = #{comm_sugg_no} AND c.comm_usage = 'Y'
START WITH c.comm_parent IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR c.comm_no = c.comm_parent ORDER SIBLINGS BY c.comm_cdate ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sugg_comment ( comm_no, comm_sugg_no, comm_parent, comm_content, comm_cdate, comm_usage, comm_writer, comm_level ) VALUES ( COMM_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{comm_sugg_no}, #{comm_parent}, #{comm_content}, SYSDATE, 'Y', #{comm_writer}, #{comm_level} )
mapper.update: UPDATE sugg_comment SET comm_content = #{comm_content}, comm_mdate = SYSDATE WHERE comm_no = #{comm_no} AND comm_usage = 'Y'
UPDATE sugg_comment SET comm_usage = 'N', comm_mdate = SYSDATE WHERE comm_no = #{comm_no} AND comm_usage = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sugg_comment WHERE comm_parent = #{comm_no} AND comm_usage = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE sugg_comment SET comm_content = '삭제된 댓글입니다.', comm_mdate = SYSDATE WHERE comm_no = #{comm_no} AND comm_usage = 'Y'
